description: Style NoteSummer glamour is tempered and balanced in this lovely french connection dress. Sweeten your warm-weather style with this dress which you can also wear with leggings. Accessorise it to add a urban spin with sky-high stiletto pumps.Product DetailsWhite woven off-shoulder dress which is elasticated above the bust region and at the waist and has floral embroidery above the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDry away from direct sunlightWash with like coloursIron back to shapeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
